description_long: This object is a precision rifle scope, featuring a long cylindrical body with a matte olive-green finish and subtle weathering marks. The scope has a large objective lens at one end and a smaller ocular lens at the other, both encased in robust metal housings. Two mounting rings are attached to the main tube, allowing it to be secured to a rifle. Prominent adjustment turrets are visible at the midpoint, likely for windage and elevation control. The surface shows signs of use, with minor scratches and darkened edges, suggesting it is built for rugged environments. The overall design is streamlined and functional, optimized for long-range targeting in urban or field settings.
description: A rugged, olive-green rifle scope with large objective and ocular lenses, mounting rings, and adjustment turrets, showing signs of use and weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the small ocular lens and the adjustment turrets on top and sides.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the scope, mounting rings, and both adjustment turrets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large objective lens and the cylindrical body tapering towards the ocular end.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the mounting rings and adjustment turrets.
